reviews.review_description:
I first saw this game and I was like “just another gtag ripoff” but then I realized it was actually pretty cool when I started playing it!

It’s already had a few updates fixing bugs and other issues, but it’s also only been a few days since release, they just released the at Patrick’s day update and it’s pretty cool!

If you like big scary at all then this game is for you!
See you in there!
This is so fun to play with friends def should try the owner is dedicated to making a good playing experience!
